title: Voice Without a Shadow
writer: Ryûta Akimoto, Seichô Matsumoto, Susumu Saji
actors: Yôko Minamida, Hideaki Nitani, Nobuo Kaneko
plot: Ishikawa, a newspaper journalist, unexpectedly meets Asako, a woman who used to work for his company some time ago as a phone operator. Three years ago, she accidentally heard the voice of a suspect who committed a still-unresolve...
